description: Engage the user in a back and forth design discussion to collaboratively figure out the function and API of a new component or hook. ---

# Challenge Design Skill

Use this skill to engage in a collaborative design discussion about a new component or hook. This skill is ideal for tackling larger, more complex features that require thoughtful design and iteration. Use when you're unsure about how to design a new component or hook, or when you would benefit from a collaborative design discussion before implementation. Also use when you say "I want to implement X but I'm not sure how to design the API" or "I have an idea for a component but I want to flesh out the details first".

If the question can be answered with a simple API recommendation, provide that. If the question is more open ended or requires discussion, ask clarifying questions to understand the user's goals and constraints, then propose a design and iterate based on feedback.

If the user is unsure, research existing solutions and best practices to inform the design. Consider edge cases, accessibility, and developer experience in the design. The goal is to arrive at a well thought out design that the user can then implement with confidence.
